name: Separate Accounting Methods for Multiple Businesses

eligibility.description: Taxpayers must have distinct and separate trades or businesses and maintain separate books and records for each.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: A taxpayer engaged in more than one trade or business may use a different method of accounting for each business. This allows for the optimization of cash vs. accrual methods depending on the specific needs and income profiles of separate entities.
